content.text:
[
  {
    "ruleId": "V-TELL-STRUCT",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "blocking",
    "where": "Turn the probe and feel it, final line of section",
    "evidence": "\"The number is not measuring what two things are. It is measuring which way they point.\"",
    "suggestion": "\"The number measures which way they point, not what the things are.\""
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-TELL-STRUCT",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "blocking",
    "where": "What the meter gets wrong, Honest edges blockquote",
    "evidence": "\"It's not a bug we hid. It's the exact gap the next session opens on.\"",
    "suggestion": "\"We didn't hide it. It's the exact gap the next session opens on.\""
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-REGISTER",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "advisory",
    "where": "The score behind the song, paragraph 1",
    "evidence": "\"two lists of numbers got compared\"",
    "suggestion": "\"something compared two lists of numbers\""
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-REGISTER",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "advisory",
    "where": "Turn the probe and feel it, Honest edges blockquote",
    "evidence": "\"the numbers in this session are chosen for readability\"",
    "suggestion": "\"we chose the numbers in this session for readability\""
  }
]
